description: FORTRESS-level detection engine with 281+ rules covering all known secret types
changelog: Complete secret detection suite: AWS, GCP, Azure, GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, payment processors, databases, private keys, PII, code injection, infrastructure, CI/CD, cloud platforms, Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare, Linear, Notion, Doppler, Vault, Terraform Cloud, PlanetScale, Railway, Fly.io, Clerk, Resend, Upstash, Neon, Turso, Replicate, Mistral, Groq, Cohere, Postman, Databricks

rules.name: AWS Secret Access Key
rules.remediation: Review and secure this AWS Secret Access Key

rules.remediation: Review and secure this AWS Access Key ID

rules.name: SQL Injection - String Concatenation
rules.example_match: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = \" + userId + \"
rules.remediation: Review and secure this SQL Injection - String Concatenation

rules.name: Vercel API Token
rules.description: Vercel deployment token — grants full access to Vercel projects and deployments

rules.name: Netlify Personal Access Token
rules.description: Netlify personal access token — grants full account and site management access

rules.name: Cloudflare Global API Key
rules.description: Cloudflare Global API key (40 hex chars) — provides full account access including DNS, WAF, and Workers
rules.remediation: Rotate Cloudflare API key in dashboard

rules.name: Cloudflare API Token
rules.description: Cloudflare scoped API token — grants permissions defined at token creation (e.g., DNS edit, Workers deploy)
rules.remediation: Rotate Cloudflare API token in dashboard

rules.name: Linear API Key
rules.description: Linear project management API key — grants read/write access to issues, projects, and team data
rules.remediation: Rotate Linear API key in settings

rules.name: Notion API Key
rules.description: Notion integration API token — grants access to shared Notion pages and databases
rules.remediation: Rotate Notion API key in integrations settings

rules.name: Doppler Service Token
rules.description: Doppler service token — grants access to a specific Doppler config/environment's secrets

rules.name: HashiCorp Vault Service Token
rules.description: HashiCorp Vault service token — grants access to vault secrets paths defined by attached policies

rules.name: Terraform Cloud API Token
rules.description: Terraform Cloud (Atlas) API token — grants access to Terraform workspaces, state, and runs
rules.remediation: Rotate Terraform Cloud token in user settings

rules.name: PlanetScale Database Token
rules.description: PlanetScale database service token — grants database read/write access

rules.name: Railway API Token
rules.description: Railway deployment platform API token — grants access to deployments, environment variables, and services
rules.remediation: Rotate Railway token in account settings

rules.name: Fly.io Deploy Token
rules.description: Fly.io deploy token — grants access to Fly.io applications and deployment operations
rules.remediation: Rotate Fly.io token with fly tokens revoke

rules.name: Clerk Secret Key
rules.description: Clerk authentication secret key — grants full API access to Clerk backend including user management
rules.remediation: Rotate Clerk secret key in dashboard

rules.name: Resend API Key
rules.description: Resend email API key — grants ability to send email from verified domains
rules.remediation: Rotate Resend API key in dashboard

rules.name: Upstash Redis/Kafka Token
rules.description: Upstash Redis or Kafka REST token — grants read/write access to serverless Redis or Kafka clusters

rules.name: Neon Database API Key
rules.description: Neon serverless Postgres API key — grants access to Neon projects and branch management
rules.remediation: Rotate Neon API key in account settings

rules.name: Turso Auth Token
rules.description: Turso (libSQL) database auth token — JWT granting access to Turso edge database
rules.remediation: Rotate Turso auth token with turso db tokens create

rules.name: Replicate API Token
rules.description: Replicate AI model inference API token — allows running AI models and may incur billing charges
rules.remediation: Rotate Replicate token in account settings

rules.name: Mistral AI API Key
rules.description: Mistral AI API key — grants access to Mistral language model inference API
rules.remediation: Rotate Mistral API key in console

rules.name: Groq API Key
rules.description: Groq LPU inference API key — grants access to ultra-fast Groq AI model inference
rules.remediation: Rotate Groq API key in console

rules.name: Cohere API Key
rules.description: Cohere AI API key — grants access to Cohere text generation, embedding, and reranking APIs
rules.remediation: Rotate Cohere API key in dashboard

rules.name: GitLab Personal Access Token
rules.description: GitLab personal access token — grants API access to GitLab repositories, pipelines, and account
rules.remediation: Revoke GitLab PAT immediately in user settings

rules.name: GitLab Pipeline Trigger Token
rules.description: GitLab pipeline trigger token — allows triggering CI/CD pipeline runs on a project
rules.remediation: Revoke GitLab pipeline token in project CI/CD settings

rules.name: Postman API Key
rules.description: Postman API key — grants access to Postman workspaces, collections, and environments
rules.remediation: Revoke Postman API key in account settings

rules.name: Databricks Personal Access Token
rules.description: Databricks personal access token — grants access to Databricks workspace APIs and cluster management
rules.remediation: Revoke Databricks token in user settings
